title: UTILITY PAYMENT DISCOUNTS - 211info
text: CITY OF HERMISTON UTILITY PAYMENT DISCOUNTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers reduced monthly utility bills for water, sewage, and garbage for eligible customers. 180 NE 2nd Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: -Water and sewer payment discounts: Must meet federal poverty guidelines -Garbage service payment discounts: Age 65 and older and must meet federal poverty guidelines Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 567-5521 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 567-5521 Water and Sewer Discount Alternate (541) 567-8842 Garbage Service Discount Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Water and sewer payment discounts: Walk in and pick up a paper application at City Hall -Garbage service payment discounts: Walk in and pick up a paper application at Sanitary Disposal 81144 N Highway 395, Hermiston, OR 97838 FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Previous calendar year federal income tax statement AREA SERVED: City of Hermiston Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Trash/Recycling Service Payment Assistance * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF HERMISTON LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CITY OF HERMISTON PARKS AND RECREATION LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER CAMP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF HERMISTON
